text:
Match the entries in column I and column II.

Column IColumn II
P. Notochord and hollow nerve cord presenti. Cyclostomata
Q. Ectoparasite with 6-15 pairs of gillsii. Chondrichthyes
R. Marine animals with placoid scalesiii. Hemichordata
S. Animals with stomochordiv. Chordata
Chromosomes are classified as metacentric, sub-metacentric, acrocentric and telocentric based on the position of:
Which one of the following options describes a triglyceride?
options: Three glycerol molecules linked to a fatty acid chain
Three fatty acid chains linked to a molecule of glycerol
Three saturated fatty acid chains linked to cholesterol
Three glyceride molecules linked to phospholipid

text: Which one of the following statements about a plant carotenoid is FALSE?
options: It accumulates in chromoplasts during fruit ripening.
It protects chlorophyll a from photo-oxidation.
It is an accessory pigment which absorbs light at 600-700 nm.
It provides precursor for the synthesis of stress hormone.

text: Mitochondria treated with Chemical X (inhibits Complex I) and Y (inhibits Complex III). ATP synthesis order?
Which autoregulatory mechanism is employed by the kidney when GFR is reduced?
options: Levels of renin and aldosterone are reduced.
Levels of renin, angiotensin I/II and aldosterone increased.
Levels of renin increased, angiotensin/aldosterone reduced.
Levels of angiotensin increased, aldosterone reduced.

text: Which condition favours maximum dissociation of oxygen from oxyhaemoglobin?
Which one of the following statements is correct regarding muscle fibres?
options: Mitochondria are more in white than red fibres.
Red muscle fibres produce ATP aerobically.
Lactic acid accumulates more in red fibres.
All muscle fibres produce ATP anaerobically.

text: Which organism produces the female gamete by mitosis of haploid cells?
Which amino acid will be charged on the tRNA with anticodon 5'-GUU-3'?
Two double heterozygous plants (PpQq) cross results. Which represents parents?

options: Viruses with DNA genome, no reverse transcriptase
Viruses with DNA genome and reverse transcriptase
Viruses with RNA genome and reverse transcriptase
Viruses with RNA genome, no reverse transcriptase

text: Plasmid digestion with enzymes X and Y. Which diagram represents sites?
Which statement is INCORRECT about honey bees?
options: Males cannot have daughters but can have sons.
Males from unfertilized, females from fertilized.
Male has no father but has grandfather.

text: Which statement regarding ecology is FALSE?
options: Only 10% energy transferred to higher trophic levels.
More than 80% solar energy captured by plants.
All organisms included for energy estimation.
